headline: Camp Dream GA gathers at the Calvin Center in Hampton, Georgia
subheadline: The Calvin Center campus gives Camp Dream GA the setting for overnight summer sessions, shared recreation, worship, meals, and a fuller community camp experience.

sections.title: Address
sections.description: Calvin Center, 3000 Highway 36 West, Hampton, Georgia 30228.

sections.title: What happens there
sections.description: The public materials point families toward a traditional camp rhythm that includes cabins, meals, recreation, worship, and shared programming.

sections.title: Why it fits the mission
sections.description: The campus environment helps camp feel immersive, communal, and welcoming rather than fragmented or rushed.

cta.heading: Use the calendar and FAQ pages to keep the timing and practical details close at hand.
cta.body: Location works best when families can also quickly find schedule and planning information.
